nasb.text: But the Lord, who brought you up from the land of Egypt with great power and with an outstretched arm, Him you shall fear, and to Him you shall bow yourselves down, and to Him you shall sacrifice.

esv.text: but you shall fear the Lord, who brought you out of the land of Egypt with great power and with an outstretched arm. You shall bow yourselves to him, and to him you shall sacrifice.

cnv.text: 但那曾用大能和伸出的膀臂把你們從埃及地領出來的耶和華，你們應當敬畏他，跪拜他和向他獻祭。

ccb.text: 耶和华伸出大能的臂膀把你们领出埃及，你们要敬拜祂，要向祂跪拜、献祭。
